title: Monsoon Fondue with Charred Bread
description: A twist on traditional fondue, featuring the flavors of monsoon spices and charred bread for a crispy snack.

ingredients.name: Charred bread
ingredients.notes: To char, grill bread over medium heat until crispy.

instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat the monsoon-spiced fondue cheese over low heat until melted and smooth.
Place charred bread slices on a baking sheet and broil until crispy.
Serve the melted cheese with the charred bread, garnished with fresh parsley.
For an added crunch, sprinkle with salt and serve immediately.
Dip bread slices into the cheese for a delicious snack.
